overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a medieval RPG showing the player character walking through a dark village at night. The player holds a wooden staff and encounters an NPC villager before proceeding down narrow cobblestone streets between half-timbered houses.

events.description: villager NPC approaches from ahead and passes by on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through the village square holding a wooden staff, approaching a villager in the center

notable_agents.action: villager wearing simple medieval clothing walking toward the player then passing by on the left

entered.detail: tall stone building with red plaster facade and small windows
two-story half-timbered building with white plaster and dark wooden beams
uneven dirt ground with scattered stones and wheel ruts
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked on the left side of the square

segments.scene_description: The player stands in a dark medieval village square at night, holding a wooden staff. A villager approaches from the distance and passes by on the left. Half-timbered houses line the square, and a wooden cart is visible ahead on the left side of the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition area between open square and narrow street

events.description: path narrows as buildings close in, transitioning from open square to confined street

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the wooden cart as the street begins to narrow

segments.scene_description: The player moves past the wooden cart on the left as the village square transitions into a narrower street. The half-timbered building on the right moves closer to the camera while the stone building on the left remains prominent. The dirt path continues forward between the structures.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow medieval street between tall buildings

agents.ego_description: walking down the narrow enclosed street between tall medieval buildings

entered.detail: lit torch mounted on the wall of the right building providing warm orange light
arched wooden doorway with a light fixture above it on the right building

segments.scene_description: The player proceeds down a narrow, enclosed medieval street with tall buildings on both sides. The wooden cart is left behind as the path narrows. A lit torch on the right wall illuminates the dirt path, and an arched doorway becomes visible ahead on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective moving from an open, dark village square into a narrow, enclosed medieval street. It begins with the player holding a wooden staff in the square as a villager passes by on the left amidst half-timbered houses and a stationary wooden cart. As the camera moves forward, the open square transitions into a tighter corridor, passing the cart on the left while the surrounding buildings press closer to the path. The scene then shifts into a narrow street where the tall structures on both sides create a sense of enclosure, leaving the square behind. Finally, the path is illuminated by a lit torch on the right wall as the camera approaches an arched doorway ahead.
